Two statements are given followed by two conclusions numbered I and II. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements. Statements: All Shirts are Cottons. Some Shirts are Nets. Conclusions: I. All Nets are Shirts. II. Some Nets are Cottons.
options: Both conclusions I and II follow.
Neither conclusion I nor II follows.
